explanations.1: This uses a Makefile substitution pattern: it takes the value of INFILE, finds anything ending in .md, and replaces that .md with .pdf to create the outfile name.
explanations.3: This defines a variable COLOR_BLUE with the value 34, which is the ANSI color code for blue text in terminal output.
explanations.6: This prints colored text to the terminal using ANSI escape codes; the \e[1;${COLOR_BLUE}m part makes the text bold and blue, and \e[0m resets the formatting back to normal.
